page_metadata.biotools__summary: RPF webserver uses RECALL, PRECISION, and F-MEASURE (RPF) for calculating global NMR structure quality scores, or how well a query 3D structure(s) fit to the experimental NOESY peak list and resonance assignment data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RPF webserver uses RECALL, PRECISION, and F-MEASURE (RPF) for calculating global NMR structure quality scores, or how well a query 3D structure(s) fit to the experimental NOESY peak list and resonance assignment data.
